title: EQ - Changed custom EQ, not saved, reset device, changes are not preset [TO BE VERIFIED]
scenario: Unsaved custom EQ changes are preserved after device reset instead of reverting to the last saved preset
steps: Select a custom EQ preset or create a new one.
Make changes to the EQ settings (e.g., adjust sliders).
Reset the device (e.g., power off/on or perform a factory reset).
Reopen the audio settings and check the EQ settings.
expected: The EQ settings should revert to the previously saved preset (i.e., the unsaved changes should be discarded).
